new_information: The folder-level AGENTS.md now contains the explicit project risk register field guidance and approved risk types, and the risk identifier format has been corrected from RDK-XXXX to RSK-XXXX.
impact_on_existing_information: This changes how agents should author and update artifacts in this folder: the AGENTS.md file now carries the operative schema guidance, and future risk entries must use RSK-prefixed identifiers.
